yogurt-pizza-dough-recipe-argiro.name: Yogurt Pizza Dough Recipe
yogurt-pizza-dough-recipe-argiro.original_name: Συνταγή για ζύμη πίτσας με γιαούρτι

ingredients.item: 1 tc mixture of herbs (ring, thyme, basil)
1 tc mixture of herbs (ring, thyme, basil)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a small pot and sauté the brown garlic for 1 minute. We remove it.
Add the tomatoes, herbs, honey, salt and pepper to the pot and leave the mixture on the heat for about 8 minutes, until the excess moisture evaporates, bind well and thicken the sauce.
Meanwhile, we prepare the dough. Mix the flour, baking powder, salt and oregano in a bowl with the spoon.
Add the yogurt and mix to wet the flour.
Once dough is formed, empty it on the counter and work with your hands until it becomes smooth and supple.
Preheat the evening to 200°C, in the air, and place a shadow long baking pan to burn.
Open the dough with the help of the maker on a thin long sheet.
Spread it on the hot baking pan and bake for 4-5 minutes in the preheated oven.
Turn the half-baked dough over onto the baking pan.
Spread the thick tomato sauce on its surface.
Sprinkle with the grated cheeses and touch local mozzarella pieces.
Add some olive oil, sprinkle with a few basil leaves and bake the pizza for 4-5 minutes, until the cheeses melt.

yummy-ice-cream-bread.name: Yummy Ice Cream Bread
instructions: Mix ice cream and flour together in a bowl just until moistened.
Spread into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until cooked through, 35 to 40 minutes.
Enjoy warm or at room temperature.
